headline: A Look At Aon (AON) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Aon (AON) is on investors’ radar today Aon (AON) is drawing attention after recent share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months while still carrying a value score of 4 and sizeable market capitalization. See our latest analysis for Aon. At a share price of US$311.51, Aon’s recent 7 day and 90 day share price returns of a 3.0% decline and a 10.9% decline sit alongside a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 11.8% and a 5 year total...
